New York & Oswego Midland Railroad papers

titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.unittitle: New York & Oswego Midland Railroad papers,
did.physdesc: Printed material, financial records, and a manuscript.
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Time tables, notices, circulars, employee agreements, material pertaining to the maintenance of equipment, freight and passenger account books, brass checks for non-English speaking employees, special passes, a typescript history of the two railroads.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Time tables, notices, circulars, employee agreements, material pertaining to the maintenance of equipment, freight and passenger account books, brass checks for non-English speaking employees, special passes, a typescript history of the two railroads, and other material for the New York and Oswego Midland Railroad and its successor, the New York, Ontario and Western Railway Co., and many connecting lines.

controlaccess.head: Names:
controlaccess.corpname: New York, Ontario, and Western Railway Co.
New York, Ontario, and Western Railway Co.

controlaccess.head: Subjects:
controlaccess.subject: Railroads -- New York (State)
Railroads -- Maintenance and repair -- New York (State)
Employees -- New York (State)
Brass checks.
Employees
Railroads
Railroads -- Maintenance and repair

odd.head: NOTES
odd.p: Includes New York and Western Railroad papers, #2058.

unittitle.extref: Link to a partial finding aid.

scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: New York & Oswego Midland Railroad Papers, #1443. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
